text.title: NeMo Guardrails Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules for NeMo Guardrails config and Colang flows.

rule.statement: Production uses `RailsConfig.from_path("./config")`. Inline `from_content()` is for tests only and never appears in deployed code.
rule.rationale: Policy and code share a deploy if config is inline; rotating policy then requires a code release. File-based config lets ops rotate policy through a config bump.

rule.statement: Input and output rails are declared separately under `rails.input.flows` and `rails.output.flows`. Never run an output check from `rails.input` or vice versa.
rule.rationale: Input and output stages have different context shapes. Mixing them gives undefined behaviour in NeMo runtime and breaks `check facts` (no bot message yet at input stage).

rule.statement: Each `define user X` block contains ≥3 representative utterance examples covering paraphrases. Single-example intents are forbidden.
rule.rationale: NeMo generalises from examples via embedding similarity; 1-2 examples collapse to one cluster and miss paraphrases. ≥3 examples give enough variance for robust intent matching.

rule.statement: Every custom `@action()` is `async def`. Sync actions are forbidden in production configs.
rule.rationale: Sync actions block the Colang event loop; one slow check stalls all parallel conversations. Async actions allow concurrent rail evaluation.

rule.statement: All custom actions are registered via `rails.register_action(fn)` BEFORE the first `rails.generate(...)` call. Lazy registration is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Late registration causes silent flow failures — the flow references an action that didn't exist at load time, and NeMo skips it without error in some versions.

rule.statement: When `check facts` rail is enabled, the config declares a `knowledge_base:` block AND every grounded answer flow ends with the `check facts` flow as an output rail.
rule.rationale: Without a KB block, `check facts` falls back to LLM self-judgment with no grounding signal — fact-check becomes noise, hallucinations pass.
